artPrompt: An evocative scene of a huge fanged beast looming in a rain-slick alley, ominously turned toward an unseen target, while a small goblin gangster pats its flank with a proprietary smirk, cigar clamped in his teeth. A single amber lamp throws their long menacing shadow up a brick wall. Mono-black noir of ink shadow and smoky brown, the implied threat of a thing pointed at the wrong family, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Protection Money
text:
Enchant creature an opponent controls
When Protection Money enters the battlefield, you create a Favor token.
Enchanted creature attacks each combat if able, but not you or planeswalkers you control. You're paid up. The others aren't.
flavorText: "Lovely creature. Big. Toothy. Sure would be a shame if it pointed itself at the wrong family."
